project_type: React + Vite SPA with Firebase Firestore integration
verification_instructions: Run npm install && npm run build to verify the application compiles cleanly with no errors.
environment_constraints: No test suite exists. Verification is limited to build success. No Docker daemon available.
contribution_requirements: Commit changes to local branch. Do NOT push.
key_patterns: App.jsx is a single 7009-line component with all state declared via useState at the top. Multi-tab detection currently uses BroadcastChannel ('thoughtflow-tab-presence') on a single channel with a project/workspace-agnostic presence heartbeat (4s interval, 10s timeout). State variables: isMultiTab (boolean), showMultiTabTooltip (boolean). UI is an amber warning banner shown in the header (lines 5199-5230). The dependency array is [] so the effect runs once on mount. activeProjectId and activeTab are both state variables that change when user switches project/workspace.
directory_structure: Single src/ directory with all components (JSX) and services (JS). No subdirectories. Config at root.
